items.description: Farzapedia, personal wikipedia of Farza, good example following my Wiki LLM tweet. I really like this approach to personalization in a number of ways, compared to "status quo" of an AI that allegedly gets better the more you use it or some…
items.description_zh: Farzapedia，Farza 的个人维基百科，是我的 Wiki LLM 推文的一个很好的例子。我真的很喜欢这种个性化方法，在很多方面，与人工智能的“现状”相比，据说你使用它越多，它就会变得更好……

items.title: Wow, this tweet went very viral!
items.description: Wow, this tweet went very viral! I wanted share a possibly slightly improved version of the tweet in an "idea file". The idea of the idea file is that in this era of LLM agents, there is less of a point/need of sharing the specific code/ap…

items.description: As AI models get better at handling tools, and as context windows get bigger without as much rot, you can start to design agents more similar to how people work instead of having to mitigate the model limitations with weird hacks. For inst…
